achievements.title: Don't Worry; it's Stage Select too
achievements.description: Activate Round Select by pressing A, C, B, C while on the Options screen. This will pause progression and recruitment achievements.

achievements.description: On 1-4, get Ashra across the EXIT on Hard without killing any enemies and without being killed.

achievements.title: Gascon's Gate Escape

achievements.title: Athletic Ashra
achievements.description: Using only Ashra, complete 1-3 in under 60 seconds having defeated all enemies without dying on hard.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: No One Fights Like Gascon
achievements.description: Complete 3-7 by killing all enemies and without dying on Hard using Gascon. No Exit allowed.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Oh Yeah...Webad
achievements.description: Complete 1-6 by killing all enemies and without dying on Hard using Webad and without damaging the gate. No Exit allowed.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: It's a Long Shot
achievements.description: Complete 1-5 by killing all enemies and without dying on Hard using Marty and using only his A attack. No Exit allowed. Special Mode okay.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Fired Up
achievements.description: Complete 1-10 by killing all enemies and without dying on Hard using Fire Knight with 165 or more left on Time. No Exit allowed. Special Mode okay.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Water You Waiting For?
achievements.description: On 2-7 cross the Exit as Water Knight without killing anyone, without dying, and with 180 seconds or more Time left on Hard. Special Mode okay.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Ancient Tornado Trick
achievements.description: Complete 5-10 as Wind Knight using B button no more than 6 times and A button no more than once and without pressing C, without dying on Hard. Select Wind Knight with A. Special Mode okay.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: This Little Light of Mine
achievements.description: Complete 4-3 by killing all enemies and without dying on Hard using Light Knight. At the beginning of the stage, activate your A/C button attack and keep at least one orb alive until the end with no resets. No Exit allowed. Special Mode okay.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Bravo, Johnny
achievements.description: Using only Johnny, reach the EXIT killing all enemies possible without dying on 1-9 on Hard.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I Think I'm Gonna Puke
achievements.description: Using only Professor, complete 2-1  using only spinning shots and defeating all enemies without dying on Hard. NOTE: must select Professor with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Howie do That?
achievements.description: Using only Howie, complete 4-7  defeating all enemies without dying on Hard.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I Think I'm Gonna Hurl
achievements.description: Using only Kip, complete 2-7  using only spinning shots and defeating all enemies without dying on Hard. NOTE: must select Kip with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: My Name is Mud
achievements.description: Using only Mud Harry, complete 1-7 using only fireballs and defeating all enemies without dying, and not moving vertically on Hard. Note: Must select Mud Harry with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: General Disarray
achievements.description: Using only General, complete 2-4 using only his flamethrower defeating all enemies without dying on Hard. NOTE: must select General with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Robie has Entered the Lobby
achievements.description: Using only Robie, complete 2-3 defeating all enemies without dying on Hard.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Cyborg vs Machine
achievements.description: Complete 5-1 by killing all enemies and without dying on Hard using Syber and attacking exclusively with his missile on Hard. No Exit allowed. NOTE: must select Syber with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Honey Roasted Nuts...I Mean Hobey
achievements.description: Using only "Hobey," complete 4-6 defeating all enemies without dying on Hard.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Bam-ba-lam
achievements.description: Using only Betty, complete 1-2 using only grenades and defeating all enemies without dying on Hard. NOTE: must select Betty with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Guess Who's Back, Backilly
achievements.description: Using only Backilly, complete 4-8 using only boomerangs and defeating all enemies without dying on Hard. NOTE: must select Backilly with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Yes, Mam!
achievements.description: Using only Mam, complete 3-9 using only boomerangs and defeating all enemies without dying on Hard. NOTE: must select Mam with A or C.
achievements.author: AfroRyan
